## What's Already Built

The `/mnt/data/voice-transcriber/` project is a **complete, well-structured bot** ready to join voice, capture per-user audio, transcribe with Whisper, and post speaker-labeled transcriptions to a text channel. Key files:

- **`bot.py`** (396 lines) -- Full Discord bot using py-cord with `!join`, `!leave`, `!status` commands. Uses a custom `TranscriptionSink` that buffers per-user PCM in 8-second chunks, dispatches to a thread pool...(truncated)
